system.effect: This spell calls forth the wrath of vengeful gods and instantly destroys a number of undead creatures equal to three times the sorcerer's Sorcery skill. All undead targets must be inside a 20m radius sphere from a point of origin chosen by the sorcerer. Skeletons and zombies turn to dust automatically. Other undead must throw END 10+ or crumble to dust. Undead with the Sorcery skill, such as vampires, are immune to this spell.
system.critSuccess: The spell destroys all non-sorcerous undead automatically, without granting them the END 8+ throw to resist, in a 40m radius!
